Disconnect from Nintendo WFC and

You are now disconnected from Nintendo

Please enter the last four digits of
the Registration Code from the\r

HGSS.186.0018:
Confirming the Registration Code.
Please wait...
HGSS.186.0020: Your Wii number has been registered.\f
HGSS.186.0021:
A password is needed to confirm your
Wii number.\f
Please enter a 4-digit number and make
note of it as your Wii number password.\f
HGSS.186.0024: Your Wii number password has been set.\f
HGSS.186.0025:
You may choose to receive a
Wii message when a trade\r
goes through at the GTS.\f
Would you like to be notified
by a Wii message?
HGSS.186.0026:
You have chosen to receive
Wii messages.\f
The next time you use the GTS, you will
be notified of trades by Wii messages.\f
HGSS.186.0027:
You have chosen not to receive
Wii messages.\f
The next time you use the GTS,
you will not be notified of trades by\r
Wii messages.\f
HGSS.186.0028:
Your Wii message settings and the
password will be deleted. Is that OK?
HGSS.186.0029: All Wii message settings were deleted.\f
HGSS.186.0032:
Saving...
Don’t turn off the power.
HGSS.186.0038:
For confirmation, please reenter your
Wii number.\f
HGSS.186.0039:
This Wii number does not match.
Please reenter it.\f
HGSS.186.0040:

Please reenter it.\f
HGSS.186.0044:
[FF00,0001]Registering a Wii Number[FF00,0000]

If your Wii number is registered,
when a trade goes through at the
GTS, you will be notified of the fact
by a Wii message.

For details, please refer to the
Instruction Booklet.

Would you like to register your
Wii number?
